compiled_state.title: Add approach_viability_concern emission instructions to reviewer agents
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Add approach_viability_concern emission instructions to reviewer agent files:
1. plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-standard.md — Add checklist item: When you detect a PATTERN (not isolated instance) of hallucinated references or fragile workarounds across multiple findings in the same diff, set approach_viability_concern: true. This signals the orchestrator that incremental fixes may be futile and the implementation approach itself may need revision.
2. plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-deep-correctness.md — Same instruction.
3. plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md — Update schema example to include approach_viability_concern as optional boolean field.
4. Do NOT add to light reviewer (haiku) — pattern detection across findings requires sufficient context capacity.

Unit test exemption: Agent prompt files with no conditional logic.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-standard.md (modify)
- plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-deep-correctness.md (modify)
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Standard reviewer contains viability concern instruction
  Verify: grep -q 'approach_viability_concern' plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-standard.md
- [ ] Deep correctness reviewer contains viability concern instruction
  Verify: grep -q 'approach_viability_concern' plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-deep-correctness.md
